     the Fermi energy is     0.5207 ev

!    total energy              =   -6197.48939124 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.9E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.04987644 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -6197.43951480 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -115474.06075253 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   58321.80103242 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2130.50849902 Ry
